novel_features.name: Commute-blocked check
novel_features.description: Plan a journey A→B and immediately see open road hazards near the journey's endpoints plus active alerts on the lines it uses — one verdict on whether your route is clear.

novel_features.name: Cheapest fuel near a place
novel_features.description: Find the cheapest station for a fuel type within N km of a named stop/POI or a planned trip's destination, ranked by price.

novel_features.name: Where's my bus on a route
novel_features.description: Show live GTFS-Realtime vehicle positions on a named route or line, ranked by distance from a chosen stop.

novel_features.name: Place snapshot
novel_features.description: Everything about one stop in a single call: next departures, line alerts, the nearest traffic cameras, and the cheapest nearby fuel.

novel_features.name: Cameras near a location
novel_features.description: List traffic cameras within N km of a stop or a lat/lng, with their JPG hrefs and optional download.

novel_features.name: Network disruptions, all modes
novel_features.description: Today's disruptions across every transport mode — GTFS-RT service alerts unioned with Trip Planner service-status messages, deduped and severity-sorted.

novel_features.name: Fuel price drift since last sync
novel_features.description: Show the price change per station for a fuel type since the last snapshot (recorded by `refresh` / `fuel prices`).
